nasb.text: to whom the word of the Lord came in the days of Josiah the son of Amon, king of Judah, in the thirteenth year of his reign.

esv.text: to whom the word of the Lord came in the days of Josiah the son of Amon, king of Judah, in the thirteenth year of his reign.

cnv.text: 猶大王亞們的兒子約西亞作王第十三年，耶和華的話臨到耶利米。

ccb.text: 犹大王亚们的儿子约西亚执政第十三年，耶和华的话传给了耶利米。
